message:
Merge PR #2005: fix(deps): update opentelemetry-go monorepo to v1.40.0

Bump OpenTelemetry Go packages from v1.38.0 to v1.40.0.
Supersedes individual dependabot PRs #2062-#2066.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/2005
Author: renovate
